methodological_rules: E1 direct evidence beats E2 proxy, E3 narrative, and E4 crowding.
Path-B permits tradeable-but-capped when the historical E1 base is direct but the forward causal claim remains E2.
Rule-X disallows peer-relative base unless the mechanism is re-confirmable for the ticker.
PASS taxonomy should preserve why a non-trade is honest, not collapse all PASS outputs into no-edge.
